case_title: WAYNE DIEUMEGARD ET AL VS. U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIEUMEGARD, WAYNE MACDONALD, SYLVAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S. DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ADRIAN ORDAZ, GENERAL MANAGER OF BRYANT ST. S.F. LOCATION. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE WITH NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DIEUMEGARD, WAYNE MACDONALD, SYLVAN AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
